<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Zakaria Arbaoui — Vidéaste & Monteur</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --gold: #C9A84C;
    --gold-light: #E8C97A;
    --obsidian: #0A0A0F;
    --deep: #0F0F1A;
    --surface: #141420;
    --surface2: #1C1C2E;
    --smoke: #2A2A40;
    --text: #F0EDE6;
    --muted: #8B8A9E;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    background: var(--obsidian);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.7;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .cursor {
    position: fixed; width: 12px; height: 12px;
    background: var(--gold); border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease; mix-blend-mode: difference;
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    position: fixed; width: 40px; height: 40px;
    border: 1px solid var(--gold); border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 9998;
    transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); opacity: 0.6;
  }
  body::before {
    content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 1000; opacity: 0.4;
  }
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    padding: 1.5rem 3rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,10,15,0.95), transparent);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  }
  .nav-logo { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; position: relative;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 60% 50%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
      linear-gradient(135deg, var(--obsidian) 0%, var(--deep) 100%);
  }
  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 80px 80px;
    mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, black 0%, transparent 65%);
  }
  .hero-left { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 8rem 3rem 8rem 3rem; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.4em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.3s forwards;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); }
  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 6vw, 7rem);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 0.9; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text);
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.5s forwards;
  }
  .hero-name em { display: block; font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 400; }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-style: italic; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.5rem); color: var(--muted);
    margin: 2rem 0 3rem; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.7s forwards;
  }
  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.9s forwards; }
  .btn-primary {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--obsidian); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s; clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 12px, 100% 100%, 12px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 12px));
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-light); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4); color: var(--gold); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--gold); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  /* HERO RIGHT — photo principale */
  .hero-right {
    position: relative; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1.2s 0.6s forwards;
  }
  .hero-right img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;
    filter: grayscale(20%) contrast(1.05);
  }
  .hero-right::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--obsidian) 0%, transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(to top, var(--obsidian) 0%, transparent 20%),
      linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,10,15,0.6) 0%, transparent 20%);
  }
  .hero-right::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.06), transparent 60%);
  }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2.5rem; left: 3rem; z-index: 10;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1s 1.5s forwards;
  }
  .hero-scroll span { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); writing-mode: vertical-rl; }
  .hero-scroll-line { width: 1px; height: 60px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent); animation: scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite; }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  .about { background: var(--deep); padding: 8rem 3rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: center; }
  .about-visual { position: relative; }
  .about-frame { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/5; overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
  .about-frame img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; transition: transform 0.6s ease; filter: contrast(1.05); }
  .about-frame:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .about-frame::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 60%, rgba(15,15,26,0.7) 100%); }
  .about-frame-border { position: absolute; top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; right: -1.5rem; bottom: -1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); z-index: -1; }
  .about-badge { position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: -1.5rem; background: var(--gold); color: var(--obsidian); padding: 1.25rem 1.75rem; z-index: 2; }
  .about-badge-num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }
  .about-badge-label { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .about-text h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .about-text h2 em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; }
  .about-text p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: #B0ADCA; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.85; }
  .section-label { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.4em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .section-label::before { content: ''; width: 30px; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); }
  .info-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; padding-top: 2.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--smoke); }
  .info-item label { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
  .info-item span { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text); }

  /* ── GALLERY / PORTFOLIO ── */
  .gallery-section { background: var(--obsidian); padding: 8rem 3rem; }
  .gallery-header { margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .gallery-header h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; }
  .gallery-header h2 em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; }

  .gallery-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
    grid-template-rows: auto auto;
    gap: 4px;
  }
  .gallery-item { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .gallery-item.large { grid-row: span 2; }
  .gallery-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); filter: grayscale(10%); }
  .gallery-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); filter: grayscale(0%); }
  .gallery-item .overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,15,0.85) 0%, transparent 50%);
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .overlay { opacity: 1; }
  .gallery-caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; z-index: 3;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); transition: all 0.4s;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover .gallery-caption { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .gallery-caption h4 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: white; }
  .gallery-caption span { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); }
  .gallery-item .gold-bar { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 3px; height: 0; background: var(--gold); z-index: 4; transition: height 0.5s; }
  .gallery-item:hover .gold-bar { height: 100%; }

  /* large item aspect */
  .gallery-item.large { min-height: 560px; }
  .gallery-item.small { min-height: 275px; }

  /* ── SKILLS ── */
  .skills-section { background: var(--deep); padding: 8rem 3rem; }
  .skills-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 4rem; }
  .skills-header h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; }
  .skills-header h2 em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; display: block; }
  .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5px; background: var(--smoke); }
  .skill-card { background: var(--deep); padding: 3rem 2.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background 0.4s; }
  .skill-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 3px; height: 0; background: var(--gold); transition: height 0.4s; }
  .skill-card:hover { background: var(--surface); }
  .skill-card:hover::before { height: 100%; }
  .skill-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; display: block; }
  .skill-card h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--text); }
  .skill-card p { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .tag { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3); padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem; }

  /* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
  .experience-section { background: var(--obsidian); padding: 8rem 3rem; }
  .exp-header { margin-bottom: 5rem; }
  .exp-header h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; }
  .exp-header h2 em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; }
  .timeline { position: relative; }
  .timeline::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--gold), transparent); }
  .timeline-item { padding-left: 4rem; margin-bottom: 4rem; position: relative; }
  .timeline-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -4px; top: 8px; width: 9px; height: 9px; background: var(--gold); border: 2px solid var(--obsidian); transform: rotate(45deg); }
  .timeline-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .timeline-date { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); }
  .timeline-company { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .timeline-company::before { content: '—'; color: var(--smoke); }
  .timeline-item h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .timeline-item p { font-size: 1rem; color: #9896B0; line-height: 1.8; max-width: 600px; }
  .timeline-highlights { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .highlight-pill { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; background: var(--surface); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text); border-left: 2px solid var(--gold); }

  /* ── QUALITIES ── */
  .qualities-section { background: var(--deep); padding: 8rem 3rem; }
  .qualities-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: var(--smoke); margin-top: 4rem; }
  .quality-item { background: var(--deep); padding: 3rem 2rem; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.4s; }
  .quality-item:hover { background: var(--surface); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .quality-num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); line-height: 1; position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem; }
  .quality-icon { font-size: 1.75rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .quality-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact-section { background: var(--obsidian); text-align: center; padding: 10rem 3rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .contact-section::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 60% at 50% 100%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07), transparent); }
  .contact-section h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 6rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; position: relative; }
  .contact-section h2 em { color: var(--gold); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; display: block; }
  .contact-section .subtitle { font-style: italic; font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 4rem; position: relative; }
  .contact-cards { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; position: relative; }
  .contact-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem 2rem; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15); color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .contact-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .contact-card .cc-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
  footer { background: var(--obsidian); padding: 2rem 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 1px solid var(--smoke); }
  footer p { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }

  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
  @keyframes scrollLine { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } 50% { transform: scaleY(0.3); } }
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px); transition: opacity 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-right { display: none; }
    .about { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 4rem; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .qualities-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-item.large { min-height: 420px; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
    .about, .gallery-section, .skills-section, .experience-section, .qualities-section, .contact-section { padding: 5rem 1.5rem; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .qualities-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Z. Arbaoui — Portfolio</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">Profil</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gallery">Galerie</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Compétences</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Expériences</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>

  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Vidéaste · Monteur · Production Audiovisuelle</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Zakaria<em>Arbaoui</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Créateur d'images qui parlent,<br>de récits qui marquent.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#gallery" class="btn-primary"><span>Voir mon travail</span><span>→</span></a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline"><span>Me contacter</span></a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Zakaria Arbaoui sur un tournage" />
  </div>

  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="hero-scroll-line"></div>
    <span>Défiler</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-visual reveal">
    <div class="about-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Zakaria Arbaoui en studio" />
    </div>
    <div class="about-frame-border"></div>
    <div class="about-badge">
      <div class="about-badge-num">3+</div>
      <div class="about-badge-label">Ans d'expérience</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-text">
    <div class="section-label">À propos</div>
    <h2>Raconter le monde<br><em>par l'image</em></h2>
    <p>Vidéaste et monteur passionné, je transforme chaque projet en une expérience visuelle mémorable. Mon expertise couvre l'intégralité de la chaîne de production — de la conception jusqu'à la diffusion finale.</p>
    <p>Collaborant avec des médias de référence comme <strong style="color:var(--text)">Hit Radio</strong> et <strong style="color:var(--text)">MRT</strong>, j'apporte une exigence constante de qualité, un sens narratif affûté et une maîtrise technique au service de la créativité.</p>
    <div class="info-grid">
      <div class="info-item"><label>Localisation</label><span>Béni Mellal, Maroc</span></div>
      <div class="info-item"><label>Nationalité</label><span>Marocaine</span></div>
      <div class="info-item"><label>Téléphone</label><span>+212 666 686 250</span></div>
      <div class="info-item"><label>Disponibilité</label><span>Immédiate</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery-section" id="gallery">
  <div class="gallery-header reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Portfolio</div>
    <h2>Sur le <em>Terrain</em></h2>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-grid reveal">
    <div class="gallery-item large">
      <div class="gold-bar"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tournage avec caméra RED Komodo" />
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="gallery-caption">
        <h4>Tournage Studio</h4>
        <span>Caméra RED Komodo · Éclairage Pro</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item small">
      <div class="gold-bar"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Direction de tournage en extérieur nuit" />
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="gallery-caption">
        <h4>Direction Plateau</h4>
        <span>Production Live · Nuit</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item small">
      <div class="gold-bar"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Zakaria en studio cinéma" />
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="gallery-caption">
        <h4>Studio Cinéma</h4>
        <span>Green Screen · Éclairage Scénique</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section class="skills-section" id="skills">
  <div class="skills-header reveal">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Compétences</div>
      <h2>Expertise<br><em>& Savoir-faire</em></h2>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card reveal">
      <span class="skill-icon">🎬</span>
      <h3>Production Audiovisuelle</h3>
      <p>Conception et réalisation de contenus vidéo à forte valeur narrative, du brief créatif à la livraison finale.</p>
      <div class="skill-tags"><span class="tag">Réalisation</span><span class="tag">Direction</span><span class="tag">Formats sériels</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <span class="skill-icon">✂️</span>
      <h3>Montage & Post-Production</h3>
      <p>Structuration narrative, rythme visuel et finitions avec une attention méticuleuse aux détails.</p>
      <div class="skill-tags"><span class="tag">Montage pro</span><span class="tag">Étalonnage</span><span class="tag">Finitions</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <span class="skill-icon">📱</span>
      <h3>Médias Numériques</h3>
      <p>Contenus optimisés pour les plateformes digitales avec un sens aigu de l'engagement et de l'impact.</p>
      <div class="skill-tags"><span class="tag">YouTube</span><span class="tag">Réseaux sociaux</span><span class="tag">Formats adaptatifs</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section class="experience-section" id="experience">
  <div class="exp-header reveal">
    <div class="section-label">Parcours</div>
    <h2>Expériences<br><em>Professionnelles</em></h2>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item reveal">
      <div class="timeline-meta">
        <span class="timeline-date">2022 — Présent</span>
        <span class="timeline-company">Maroc</span>
      </div>
      <h3>Vidéaste & Monteur Vidéo</h3>
      <p>Réalisation et montage de contenus audiovisuels pour les médias numériques. Intervention sur toutes les phases : pré-production, tournage, montage et post-production.</p>
      <div class="timeline-highlights">
        <span class="highlight-pill">🎙️ Hit Radio — YouTube</span>
        <span class="highlight-pill">📺 Collaboration MRT</span>
        <span class="highlight-pill">🎞️ Caméra RED Komodo</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item reveal">
      <div class="timeline-meta">
        <span class="timeline-date">Rencontre marquante</span>
        <span class="timeline-company">Événement privé — Maroc</span>
      </div>
      <h3>Kastor Productions</h3>
      <p>Rencontre déterminante avec M. Pier-Emanuel Giry, cofondateur de Kastor Productions — échange qui a renforcé l'intérêt pour les productions à dimension internationale.</p>
      <div class="timeline-highlights">
        <span class="highlight-pill">🌍 Dimension internationale</span>
        <span class="highlight-pill">🎭 Production indépendante</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- QUALITIES -->
<section class="qualities-section">
  <div class="section-label reveal">Qualités</div>
  <div class="qualities-grid">
    <div class="quality-item reveal"><span class="quality-num">01</span><span class="quality-icon">🎯</span><div class="quality-name">Rigueur & Détail</div></div>
    <div class="quality-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.1s"><span class="quality-num">02</span><span class="quality-icon">💡</span><div class="quality-name">Créativité</div></div>
    <div class="quality-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.2s"><span class="quality-num">03</span><span class="quality-icon">🤝</span><div class="quality-name">Esprit d'équipe</div></div>
    <div class="quality-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.3s"><span class="quality-num">04</span><span class="quality-icon">⚡</span><div class="quality-name">Adaptabilité</div></div>
    <div class="quality-item reveal" style="transition-delay:0.4s"><span class="quality-num">05</span><span class="quality-icon">🔥</span><div class="quality-name">Engagement</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact-section" id="contact">
  <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center">Contact</div>
  <h2 class="reveal">Travaillons<br><em>Ensemble</em></h2>
  <p class="subtitle reveal">Disponible pour projets audiovisuels, collaborations et productions</p>
  <div class="contact-cards reveal">
    <a href="tel:+212666686250" class="contact-card"><span class="cc-icon">📞</span><span>+212 666 686 250</span></a>
    <a href="#" class="contact-card"><span class="cc-icon">📍</span><span>Béni Mellal, Maroc</span></a>
    <a href="#" class="contact-card"><span class="cc-icon">🎬</span><span>Disponible dès maintenant</span></a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>© 2025 Zakaria Arbaoui — Tous droits réservés</p>
  <p>Vidéaste · Monteur · Production Audiovisuelle</p>
</footer>

<script>
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    mx=e.clientX; my=e.clientY;
    cursor.style.left=mx-6+'px'; cursor.style.top=my-6+'px';
  });
  function animateRing(){
    rx+=(mx-rx)*0.12; ry+=(my-ry)*0.12;
    ring.style.left=rx-20+'px'; ring.style.top=ry-20+'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(animateRing);
  }
  animateRing();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cursor.style.transform='scale(2.5)';ring.style.transform='scale(0.5)';});
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cursor.style.transform='scale(1)';ring.style.transform='scale(1)';});
  });
  const reveals=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});
  },{threshold:0.12});
  reveals.forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
HTMLEOF

echo "Template created"
